name: hivekeep-plugin-home-assistant
description: Control your smart home via Home Assistant. Toggle lights, check sensors, run automations, and monitor your home.
author: MarlBurroW

haUrl.label: Home Assistant URL
haUrl.description: Base URL of your Home Assistant instance (e.g. http://homeassistant.local:8123)

haToken.label: Long-Lived Access Token
haToken.description: Generate one in Home Assistant: Profile > Security > Long-Lived Access Tokens

areaFilter.label: Area Filter (optional)
areaFilter.description: Comma-separated list of area names to limit scope (empty = all areas)
